---
title: "Auto-Progress Reveal.js Presentation"
output:
  revealjs::revealjs_presentation:
    # theme: sky  # Optional: choose from default, simple, sky, beige, serif, blood, moon
    center: true
    # transition: slide  # Optional: fade, slide, convex, concave, zoom
    self_contained: true
    # lib_dir: libs
    # includes:
    #  before_body: configure.html
    css: custom.css
    reveal_options:
      slideNumber: true
      previewLinks: true
      # controlsLayout: 'bottom-left'
      autoSlide: 700
      transition: none
---

## Slide 1: Introduction

- This presentation auto-advances every 1 second [web:1][web:2].
- Uses reveal.js via R Markdown [web:6].

_folien_
